cells.A:
Email anomaly detected: Recommend contact verification before contract stage
Client located in Suame Magazine:  strategic cluster relevance
Request involves IP/patent documentation:  Signaling High-value + Sensitive Work
Attachments provided: Sufficient for initial intake progression
cells.M: Description of Primary activities of Organizaiton
cells.R: General engineering fabrication, machining services, and product innovation focused on prototype development within the Suame Magazine industrial cluster.

cells.I: To develop accurate engineering documentation of an existing prototype for Intellectual Property (IP) / Patent Registration, ensuring compliance with patent office illustration standards.

3D CAD Model of the prototype
Patent-compliant technical drawings (line illustrations)
Technical drawing package (dimensions & views)
Rendered images for visualization
Multi-format outputs (SVG, AI, EPS, PDF, STEP)

All outputs must strictly match the prototype (no design changes)
Visual style must replicate patent office sample drawing provided
No additional features or redesign required
Limited source data (images only, no dimensions provided)
No periodic drafts requested (internal risk consideration)

cells.A: 3.0 SYSTEMS ENGINEERING TRANSLATION (Fill N/A if not applicable to request type)

cells.B:
Existing physical prototype (mechanical assembly)
Prototype images (multiple views)
cells.M:
Digitized 3D CAD model
Structured geometric representation of the product

cells.B:
Patent sample drawing (format reference)
Client instructions and constraints
Visual interpretation from images
cells.M:
Engineering drawings (ISO + patent format)
Dimensional data and annotations
Documentation for IP submission

cells.B: This is a Reverse Engineering + IP Documentation Project
Requires measurement validation before modeling finalization
No draft policy from client → internally override with validation checkpoint
High strategic value due to Suame Magazine ecosystem alignment

cells.U: No baseline CAD data available. Full reconstruction required.
Critical to obtain accurate dimensions. Image-based estimation alone is insufficient for patent-level documentation.
Must strictly follow patent illustration conventions (line weights, views, no shading).
Images will guide geometry but not dimensions. Risk of distortion.
Missing explicit dimensions and tolerances. Requires clarification or controlled assumptions.
Ensure clarity for fabrication if required in future.
Exploded views may be required depending on complexity.
Parametric model required for future edits and reuse.

cells.F: Patent Office Standard (Black & White Line Art) + Colored Pictorial Representation on Realistic Background.
cells.U: Must strictly match patent formatting style (no shading, consistent line hierarchy).
For presentation purposes only (not for patent submission).

cells.A: Does the provided source data allow for the requested tolerances? (Yes/No):
cells.K: No explicit dimensions or physical measurements provided. Image-based reconstruction alone cannot guarantee manufacturing or patent-level accuracy.

cells.A: Is a site visit required for manual measurements? (Yes/No):
cells.K:
To:
Capture precise dimensions
Validate geometry
Ensure patent compliance accuracy
Reduce legal/IP risk

cells.A: Thank you for reaching out to IMHOGEN LTD. We have successfully received your project inquiry regarding Plastic Extruding Innovation for Patent Application and associated reference sample and Prototype images, submitted on Saturday, 4th April, 2026.
Your request has been assigned the tracking reference : CAD-1775340276795

Our Engineering and R&D team is currently reviewing the initial details you provided. A Project Onboarding Manager will contact you within the next 24-48 hours to propose a time for a brief Technical Discovery Meeting. This meeting will help us better understand your specific constraints to ensure we deliver tailored engineering solution.
If you have any supplementary documents information on scope, please share them.
We look forward to collaborating with you.
(P.S: Request Filled On your behalf by Technical Support Team, find the filled form attached)

cells.F: To transform an existing physical prototype into a precise digital engineering asset, supported by patent-compliant technical documentation, enabling successful Intellectual Property (IP) registration and future product development.
Digitize the prototype into an accurate 3D CAD model
Develop detailed engineering drawings aligned with ISO standards
Produce patent-compliant technical illustrations based on provided reference
Deliver multi-format outputs suitable for documentation, submission, and presentation
Ensure dimensional accuracy through on-site measurement and validation

cells.A: 3.0 PHASED DELIVERABLES & TIMELINE (Abstracted from D1.13 SOW)

cells.J: On-site prototype measurement and proportionality/dimensional data capture
Rendered visuals and final file compilation

cells.A: 4.0 PROJECT BUDGET SUMMARY (Value-Based Pricing - Sourced from D1.14 Sec 4.0)

cells.E:
Structural analysis or FEA
Material selection or engineering optimization
Patent filing services (only documentation support provided)
Fabrication or manufacturing execution
Product redesign or feature modification

Access to physical prototype for measurement
Clarification of any hidden/internal features if required
Timely communication and approval during execution
Confirmation of patent drawing standard if required

cells.G: This is a Draft Budget for discussion purposes. A formal binding contract will be issued upon agreement of these terms.
Reverse engineering and parametric reconstruction of prototype into a precise 3D CAD model
Full 2D technical drawings (dimensions, orthographic views, sections) aligned with ISO 128
Patent-compliant technical illustrations (black line format, no shading, standardized views)
High-quality visual renders for presentation and documentation support
On-site measurement and dimensional validation of prototype at client location (Suame)

cells.S: Includes short site visit + dimensional capture

cells.B: No Structural Analysis or FEA included.
No Patent Filing Services (only drawing support)
No redesign or feature modification beyond existing prototype
